characters.description: The void-using leader of a nine-person party newly arrived in Savannah. Derek seeks property for a combined home and business while pursuing a meeting with the city's ruling house.
characters.name: Derek Hunt

characters.description: Derek's telepathic companion and a member of his traveling household. She registers alongside the group when they enter Savannah.
characters.name: Silvi

characters.description: A member of Derek's party who enters Savannah and publicly declares that House Torith no longer binds him. A former associate recognizes him as Jackson and the Crimson Blade.
characters.name: Jacks

characters.description: A contract specialist traveling with Derek's household. He arrives in Savannah as part of the group that needs permanent accommodation and commercial premises.
characters.name: Rudy

characters.description: A wind user who arrives in Savannah among the people under Derek's protection. She is part of the household seeking a stable new base in the city.
characters.name: Rayna West

characters.description: A young crafter who reaches Savannah with her mother, Malorie, and Derek's group. The party's search for a permanent home also needs room for her developing work.
characters.name: Brandi Fields

characters.description: Brandi's mother and a member of Derek's newly arrived household. She enters Savannah with the group as they move into temporary Crown lodging.
characters.name: Malorie

characters.description: A young spear trainee traveling under Derek's protection. He arrives with the household that plans to settle in Savannah and prepare him for further training.
characters.name: Thomas Stewart

characters.description: A Crown manager and Derek's commercial contact in Savannah. She covers the party's entry charge against future proceeds and directs him toward finding property while Alanah Swan arranges discounted temporary lodging.
characters.name: Stella Brighton

characters.description: The Crown leader whose arrangements secure reduced-price hotel rooms for Derek's party. Her support gives the newcomers a temporary base while they establish themselves in Savannah.
characters.name: Alanah Swan

characters.description: The head of House Savannah and the city leader Derek hopes to meet. Access to her requires an appointment, so he first turns his attention to securing property.
characters.name: Natalie Savannah

characters.description: Savannah's Onyx-ranked Adventurer's Guildmaster and an expert spear user. After assessing Thomas's promise, he grants the trainee unrestricted access to a high-tier room and offers regular instruction.
characters.name: Shae

characters.description: Derek reports killing this son after hearing him acknowledge a role in trafficking children. The admission is Derek's only evidence, and he believes the man had limited knowledge of the broader operation.
characters.name: Gerald Torith's son

characters.description: An Indrian elf dignitary, the daughter of a duke and niece of her kingdom's ruler. She encounters Derek at the Guild with an earlier hostile exchange between them still unsettled.
characters.name: Sabrina Elris

characters.description: The short, stout proprietor of the bar where Shae brings Derek after his rank assessment. Shae introduces the two men over a celebratory drink.
characters.name: Roman

characters.description: The Alabaster Homes representative competing to construct Derek's mixed residence and business. He distinguishes his bid by offering to complete the project at the cost of materials.
characters.name: Jeffrey

characters.description: Roman's research assistant, an alchemist specializing in research and herbology. She observes Derek's experimental potion tests at Roman's shop.
characters.name: Freya

characters.description: Sidaria's king, confronted with Gerald's allegations against Derek and Alanah's account of the kidnapping of Brandi and Malorie. He promises an independent inquiry into the dispute.
characters.name: King Edwin

characters.description: The Sidarian crown prince, present when Alanah presents her account of Derek's conflict with House Torith. He shows an immediate interest in meeting the newly ranked adventurer.
characters.name: Edward

characters.description: A powerful House Torith noble who accuses Derek of killing members of his family and guards. He denies knowledge of the kidnapping attributed to his son and faces a royal inquiry.
characters.name: Gerald Torith

characters.description: Gerald Torith's dead son, named among the people Gerald accuses Derek of killing. Gerald claims Malcolm acted without his knowledge in the kidnapping attributed to him.
characters.name: Malcolm

characters.description: A Crown figure who oversees two of Alanah Swan's students while preparations begin for the Savannah void-beast auction.
characters.name: Avery Swan

characters.description: A platinum-ranked academy graduate serving in Edgar's military company and adventuring party. He comes to Derek's shop after receiving a letter from his father, Jacks.
characters.name: Jake Herrett

characters.description: An Onyx adventurer, military leader, and Jake's superior. He accompanies Jake to Savannah, then joins the urgent effort to rescue Jacks from an ambush outside the city.
characters.name: Edgar

characters.description: A returning House Torith criminal already confined by Derek when the book begins. His continued custody is part of the unresolved conflict between Derek's group and House Torith.
characters.name: Clay Torith

characters.description: An armored protector traveling with Gerald Torith. He is next in line to a noble family ranked third in power within the kingdom and accompanies Gerald to a covert meeting beyond the capital.
characters.name: Gerald Torith's armored bodyguard

characters.description: The first son of House Arden and a formidable earth user. He helps Gerald ambush Edward's party in the palace courtyard and attacks the prince's guards.
characters.name: Cliff Arden

characters.description: The shadow-using vice leader of the Assassin's Guild who joins Gerald's palace ambush. This attacker restrains and grievously injures Edward's guards while delaying the crown prince.
characters.name: Assassin's Guild vice leader

characters.description: A cloaked ally of Gerald who participates in the palace ambush using plant-based attacks. The attack leaves his identity concealed when he first joins the fighting.
characters.name: Unidentified plant user

characters.description: The House Arden heir whom Edgar identifies as the earth user Cliff Arden. He is one of Gerald's allies inside the shadow-sealed battlefield.
characters.name: Clifford Arden

characters.description: The shadow-using Assassin's Guild vice leader, now identified by Edgar. Her abilities have sealed the battlefield and disabled Edward while Gerald's group attempts to escape.
characters.name: Vanessa Hodges
